fields.name: addressUpdates
fields.description: Collection of address change records submitted by customer_services for processing by the accounts department

children.name: updateId
children.description: Unique identifier for this address update record

children.name: customerId
children.description: Unique identifier of the customer whose address is being updated

children.name: timestamp
children.description: Date and time when the address update was initiated in customer_services

children.name: department
children.description: Originating department that submitted the address update

children.name: targetDepartment
children.description: Destination department responsible for processing and approving the address update

children.name: updateType
children.description: Classification of the address modification being requested

children.name: previousAddress
children.description: The customer's address prior to this update

children.name: addressLine1
children.description: Primary street address or building identifier

children.name: addressLine2
children.description: Secondary address detail such as suite, floor, or apartment number

children.name: city
children.description: City or town name

children.name: postalCode
children.description: Postal or ZIP code

children.name: country
children.description: Country name

children.name: newAddress
children.description: The customer's address after this update

children.name: addressLine1
children.description: Primary street address or building identifier

children.name: addressLine2
children.description: Secondary address detail such as suite, floor, or apartment number

children.name: city
children.description: City or town name

children.name: postalCode
children.description: Postal or ZIP code

children.name: country
children.description: Country name

children.name: status
children.description: Current approval and processing state of the address update within the accounts department

children.name: priority
children.description: Processing priority level assigned to this address update

fields.name: metadata
fields.description: Batch-level contextual information about the address updates message

children.name: batchId
children.description: Unique identifier for this batch of address updates

children.name: totalRecords
children.description: Count of address update records contained in this batch

children.name: generatedAt
children.description: Date and time when the batch message was generated

children.name: source
children.description: System or department that generated this batch
